property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

pm;C:\Program Files\OpenSSL-Win64 in;C:\Users\MSI\Downloads\apache-maven-3.9.10-bin\apache-maven-3.9.10 in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17 in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.0 in;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\mongosh-2.5.3-win32-x64 in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\WebStorm 2025.1.3 in;;D:\src lutter in;C:\php;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2025.2.4 in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.5 in;C:\Users\MSI\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;c:\Users\MSI\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5 undled\scripts

oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Administrator approves a leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Administrator approves a leave request # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:7 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "In Progress" And the user is the final approver in the approval chain And the user has not previously approved the request When the user approves the leave request And the system adjusts the leave balance according to the leave type Then the request status changes to "Granted" And the system displays "Request granted successfully"
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Authenticated with JWT token

testcase.name: Team Lead approves a leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Team Lead approves a leave request # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:16 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Pending" And the user is an intermediate approver in the approval chain And the user has not previously approved the request When the user approves the leave request Then the request status changes to "In Progress" And the system marks the manager's validation as TRUE
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Authenticated with JWT token

testcase.name: User is not authorized to approve the leave request
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User is not authorized to approve the leave request # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:24 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Pending" And the user is not in the approval chain When the user attempts to approve the leave request Then the system displays the error You are not authorized to modify the status of this request.
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Authenticated with JWT token

testcase.name: User tries to approve a request that is not in a valid state
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User tries to approve a request that is not in a valid state # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:30 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Granted" And the user is in the approval chain When the user attempts to approve the leave request Then the system displays the error If the request is not in a valid state ("Pending" or "In Progress"), validation is blocked.
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Authenticated with JWT token

testcase.name: User tries to approve a request they have already previously approved
testcase.system-out: Scenario: User tries to approve a request they have already previously approved # features/leave-request-service_approve-leave-request_20260316_113158.feature:36 Given the user is authenticated # com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps.theUserIsAuthenticated() Given the leave request status is "Pending" And the user is in the approval chain And the user has previously approved the request When the user attempts to approve the leave request Then the system displays the error If the user has already validated previously, the validation is refused.
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO com.example.auth.steps.AuthSteps - Authenticated with JWT token
